## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Checks

- [ ] I worked on `dev` or a branch created from `dev`
- [ ] I did not push directly to `main`
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior or workflow changed
- [ ] I ran the relevant local checks
- [ ] I expect CI to pass before merge

- Risk or rollback notes:
- Follow-up work:
